selection_basis.ledger_reason: This was the next uncovered active `a2_state` parent after the export-lineage reduction.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the live-state/index packet into a smaller controller-usable boundary set without rereading raw sources or mutating active state files.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next active sibling once the source-like `a2_state` sweep is narrowed.
Best direct work-surface follow-on if the queue returns to export revision archaeology.
Later active sibling after the first `a1_state` judgment packet.

raw_source_reread_reason: Parent artifacts already isolate the live registries, index surfaces, abstraction overlays, and memory-chain contradictions needed for this bounded reduction.

candidate_items.name: ACTIVE_STATE_STORE_CLASS_SEPARATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent packet's strongest store-topology rule without flattening registries, indices, overlays, and memory chain into one surface.

candidate_items.name: MEMBERSHIP_EQUIVALENT_INGEST_INDICES_ARE_STILL_DISTINCT_ARTIFACTS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps same-membership ingest indices from collapsing into one artifact identity.

candidate_items.name: DOC_INDEX_IS_BROADER_CLASSIFICATION_NOT_INGEST_COPY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the broader audit/classification role of `doc_index.json` and its quarantine-bearing scope.

candidate_items.name: DOC_CARD_SYSTEM_MAP_OVERLAY_IS_NOT_ID_OR_PATH_COMPATIBLE_INDEX
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent packet's strongest overlay/index mismatch into one controller-usable boundary rule.

candidate_items.name: LIVE_REGISTRY_COUNTS_MUST_NOT_COLLAPSE_TO_ONE_PROGRESS_METRIC
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves layer-specific counters without letting them collapse into one progress or admission score.

candidate_items.name: MEMORY_CHAIN_SEMANTIC_CORE_OVER_AUTOSAVE_CHURN
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the memory chain chronologically useful without letting autosave noise bury the smaller semantic event stream.

quarantined_items.name: INDEXED_PRESENCE_AS_TRUSTED_ADMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The active `doc_index.json` explicitly retains quarantined high-entropy sources and residue paths, so indexed presence cannot self-authorize trust.

quarantined_items.name: LIVE_UPDATE_LANGUAGE_AS_MUTATION_PERMISSION_IN_THIS_LANE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Current-state and update-semantics files cannot be treated as permission to mutate active state from this intake-only lane.

notes: This batch preserves the live-state/index packet as active state archaeology and controller fuel rather than mutation authority.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
